fields.name: Normal Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the normal starting time of the workday.

fields.name: Normal Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the normal ending time of a workday.

fields.name: Doc. No. Is Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the production order number is also the document number in the ledger entries posted for the production order.

fields.name: Cost Incl. Setup
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the setup times are to be included in the cost calculation of the Standard Cost field.

fields.name: Dynamic Low-Level Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies low-level codes are dynamically assigned to each component in a product structure. Note that this may affect performance. The top final assembly level is denoted as level 0, the end item. The higher the low-level code number, the lower the item is in the hierarchy. The codes are used in the planning of component parts. When you calculate a plan, the BOM is exploded in the planning worksheet, and the gross requirements for level 0 are passed down the planning levels as gross requirements for the next planning level.

fields.name: Planning Warning
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to run the MRP engine to detect if planned shipment dates cannot be met.

fields.name: Simulated Order Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to a simulated production order.

fields.name: Planned Order Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to a planned production order.

fields.name: Firm Planned Order Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to firm planned production orders.

fields.name: Released Order Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to a released production order.

fields.name: Work Center Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to work centers.

fields.name: Machine Center Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to machine centers.

fields.name: Production BOM Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to production BOMs.

fields.name: Routing Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code to use when assigning numbers to routings.

fields.name: Current Production Forecast
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the relevant demand forecast to use to calculate a plan. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Use Forecast on Variants
fields.tooltip: Specifies that actual demand for the selected demand forecast is nettet for the specified item variant. If you leave the check box empty, the program regards the demand forecast as valid for all variants. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Use Forecast on Locations
fields.tooltip: Specifies that actual demand for the selected demand forecast is nettet for the specified location only. If you leave the check box empty, the program regards the demand forecast as valid for all locations. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Combined MPS/MRP Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies if both master production schedule and material requirements plan are run when you choose the Calc. Regenerative Plan action in the planning worksheet. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Components at Location
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory location from where the production order components are to be taken.

fields.name: Default Dampener Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies a period of time during which you do not want the planning system to propose to reschedule existing supply order's forward. This value in this field applies to all items except for items that have a different value in the Dampener Period field on the item card. When a dampener time is set, an order is only rescheduled when the defined dampener time has passed since the order s original due date. Note: The dampener time that is applied to an item can never be higher than the value in the item's Lot Accumulation Period field. This is because the inventory build-up time that occurs during a dampener period would conflict with the build-up period defined by the item's lot accumulation period. Accordingly, the default dampener period generally applies to all items. However, if an item's lot accumulation period is shorter than the default dampener period, then the item's dampener time equals its lot accumulation period. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Default Dampener %
fields.tooltip: Specifies a percentage of an item's lot size by which an existing supply must change before a planning suggestion is made. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Default Safety Lead Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a time period that is added to the lead time of all items that do not have another value specified in the Safety Lead Time field. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Blank Overflow Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the planning system should react if the Overflow Level field on the item or SKU card is empty. Use Inventory Setup page to change this field.

fields.name: Show Capacity In
fields.tooltip: Specifies which capacity unit of measure to use by default to record and track capacity.

fields.name: Default Consum. Calc. Based on
fields.tooltip: Specifies default calculation based on, used for consumption calculation. Whether the calculation of the quantity to consume is based on the actual output or on the expected output (the quantity of finished goods that you expect to produce).

fields.name: Finish Order without Output
fields.tooltip: Specifies that status of orders with no output can be changed to finished and the WIP will be written off to Inventory Adjustment Account.

fields.name: Inc. Non. Inv. Cost To Prod
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to include the cost of non-inventory items in the cost of produced items.

fields.name: Load SKU Cost on Manufacturing
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to load SKU Cost in the item at the time of manufacturing.

fields.name: Manual Scheduling
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the End/Due Dates on the production have been scheduled manually.

fields.name: Safety Lead Time for Man. Sch.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time that will be added to the End date to calculate the Due Date when the production order is manually scheduled.

fields.name: Default Gen. Bus. Post. Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default general business posting group for production orders.

fields.name: Copy Loc. to Cap. Val. Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the Location Code from the production order is copied to value entries linked to capacity ledger entries. When enabled, Inventory Posting Setup for that specific location is used. When disabled, Location Code remains blank on capacity value entries and Inventory Posting Setup for blank location is used.

fields.name: Default Flushing Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies default flushing method assigned to new items. A different flushing method on item cards will override this default.

fields.name: Preset Output Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies what to show in the Output Quantity field of a production journal when it is first opened.
